creator: jjuanino@gmail.com
text:
Dear FreeBSD committer:

I send a patch to update sqldeveloper port from 1.5.3.57.83 to 1.5.4.59.40 version:

# cd /usr/ports/databases/sqldeveloper
# patch -p1 < pathToPatch.diff
# rm *.orig

Release notes:

www.oracle.com/technology/products/database/sql_developer/files/relnotes_v154.html

Best regards

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
